mapper.select: SELECT a.award_id, a.project_id, p.project_name, a.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, a.evaluation_id, a.status, a.winning_submission_id, a.winner_enterprise_id, a.winner_name_snapshot, a.winner_credit_code, a.award_amount, a.confirm_user_id, a.confirm_time, a.public_notice_time, a.rollback_reason, a.remark, a.version, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM t_bid_award a INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = a.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = a.lot_id WHERE a.award_id = #{awardId} AND a.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.award_id, a.project_id, p.project_name, a.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, a.evaluation_id, a.status, a.winning_submission_id, a.winner_enterprise_id, a.winner_name_snapshot, a.winner_credit_code, a.award_amount, a.confirm_user_id, a.confirm_time, a.public_notice_time, a.rollback_reason, a.remark, a.version, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM t_bid_award a INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = a.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = a.lot_id WHERE a.lot_id = #{lotId} AND a.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY a.award_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sv.price_amount FROM t_bid_submission s INNER JOIN t_bid_submission_version sv ON sv.submission_id = s.submission_id AND sv.version_no = s.latest_version_no AND sv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE s.submission_id = #{submissionId} AND s.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_award
status = #{status}, winning_submission_id = #{winningSubmissionId}, winner_enterprise_id = #{winnerEnterpriseId}, winner_name_snapshot = #{winnerNameSnapshot}, winner_credit_code = #{winnerCreditCode}, award_amount = #{awardAmount}, confirm_user_id = #{confirmUserId}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, public_notice_time = #{publicNoticeTime}, rollback_reason = #{rollbackReason}, remark = #{remark}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE award_id = #{awardId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
